name: PrimeVue
description: Next Generation Vue UI Component Library with 80+ components featuring rich design systems and enterprise support

description.value: Next Generation Vue UI Component Library with 80+ components featuring rich design systems and enterprise support

initial-release.comment: First release December 4, 2018; project now in Year 8 as of 2026 roadmap

framework.comment: Built specifically for Vue 3, also supports Vue 2

styling-approach.comment: V4 uses CSS variables with design tokens; offers both styled and unstyled modes; legacy SASS removed in v4

component-model.comment: Offers both styled mode (with prebuilt themes) and unstyled mode for complete customization

typescript.comment: Full TypeScript support with type definitions included in npm package

ssr-compatible.comment: Works with Nuxt and other SSR frameworks; official Nuxt module available; some components (Chart, Editor, FullCalendar) excluded by default

rsc-compatible.comment: N/A - React Server Components are React-specific; PrimeVue is for Vue

design-system.comment: Design-agnostic library with 4 built-in presets: Aura (default), Material (Google MD v2), Lara (Bootstrap-based), Nora (enterprise)

dark-mode.comment: Dynamic dark mode switching via CSS variables; system default or custom selector support

theming-system.comment: 3-tier design token system (primitive, semantic, component); visual Theme Designer tool available

css-variables.comment: V4 fully utilizes CSS variables; tokens accessible via var(--p-*) or $dt() utility

design-tokens.comment: Full design token architecture with primitive, semantic, and component tiers

rtl-support.comment: Native RTL support via FlexBox; enabled by setting dir='rtl' or direction: rtl; all components except Galleria and Carousel

component-count.comment: 80+ production-ready components; some sources cite 90+ including all variants

text-input.comment: InputText component with small/large sizes, FloatLabel support

select.comment: Select (Dropdown) component with filtering, showClear, v-model binding

multi-select.comment: MultiSelect with VirtualScroller support for 100K+ options, filtering, showClear

combobox.comment: AutoComplete component provides searchable/filterable select with autocomplete

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component; uses hidden native checkbox for accessibility

radio.comment: RadioButton component for radio button groups

slider.comment: Slider component with single or dual-thumb support

tag-input.comment: Chips component for multiple tags/tokens with add/remove

pin-input.comment: InputOtp for one-time passwords; configurable length (default 4), integerOnly option, small/large sizes

color-picker.comment: ColorPicker component with full picker UI

date-picker.comment: DatePicker (Calendar in v3) with customizable format, minDate/maxDate, multiple selection, time picker, timeOnly mode

time-picker.comment: Included in DatePicker via showTime prop; supports 12/24 hour format, timeOnly mode available

date-range-picker.comment: DatePicker supports range selection via selectionMode property

rating-input.comment: Rating component (star-based selection); uses radio buttons internally for accessibility

input-groups.comment: Input groups with addons (icons, buttons, text) supported

button-groups.comment: Button groups and ToggleButton for segmented controls

split-button.comment: SplitButton component for button with dropdown for secondary actions

data-table.comment: DataTable with sorting, filtering, pagination, inline editing, virtual scrolling, lazy loading

virtual-infinite-list.comment: VirtualScroller component for large datasets; integrated with DataTable and MultiSelect

tree-view.comment: Tree component with lazy loading, expandedKeys control

list-view.comment: Listbox and OrderList components for styled lists

avatar.comment: Avatar with xlarge/large sizes, circle/square shapes; AvatarGroup for grouping; OverlayBadge integration

badge.comment: Badge component; OverlayBadge for status indicators on other elements

tag-chip-pill.comment: Chip and Tag components; removable, with images/labels

timeline.comment: Timeline component for vertical timeline of events

calendar.comment: Calendar component for month/week view display (separate from DatePicker)

alert.comment: Message and InlineMessage components for static alerts

toast-notification.comment: Toast component with ToastService for programmatic control via useToast() or $toast

progress-bar.comment: ProgressBar component with reactive value; custom content via default slot

spinner-loader.comment: Spinner/loader components for indeterminate loading states

skeleton.comment: Skeleton placeholder with Rectangle, Rounded, Square shapes; customizable dimensions

empty-state.comment: Empty state templates supported in components like DataTable

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component; ConfirmDialog with ConfirmationService for programmatic control

popover.comment: Popover (formerly OverlayPanel) with toggle/show/hide methods; uses dialog role, aria-modal

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component for hover hint text

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu component with overlay mode; supports navigation, aria-label, aria-disabled

context-menu.comment: ContextMenu displays overlay menu on contextmenu event

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette component; could be built using Dialog + AutoComplete

tabs.comment: Tabs component with router integration support; scrollable option for many tabs

breadcrumb.comment: Breadcrumb component with home property, custom templates; aria-current support

pagination.comment: Paginator with customizable template, rowsPerPageDropdown; aria-label support

stepper.comment: Steps component for multi-step process indicator

sidebar.comment: Sidebar component; PanelMenu for collapsible sidebar navigation

bottom-navigation.comment: TabMenu can be styled for mobile bottom nav; Dock component available

grid.comment: No dedicated Grid layout component; PrimeFlex utility library provides grid classes

stack.comment: No dedicated Stack component; use PrimeFlex utility classes for flex layouts

container.comment: No dedicated Container component; use PrimeFlex utility classes

divider.comment: Divider component with horizontal/vertical layout support

collapsible.comment: Accordion, Panel, Fieldset components provide collapsible sections

splitter.comment: Splitter with horizontal/vertical layout, minSize configuration

rich-text-editors.comment: Official Editor component based on Quill; requires Quill as dependency; customizable toolbar via slots

code-editors.comment: No official code editor integration; community solutions exist

chart-libraries.comment: Chart component included; built on Chart.js

form-libraries.comment: No official form library integration; community FormKit adapter available

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in animation support via Ripple directive and component transitions

icon-libraries.comment: PrimeIcons (200+ icons) included; supports FontAwesome, Material Icons, custom SVGs via templates

date-libraries.comment: DatePicker has built-in date handling; no external date library required

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns; uses roles, aria-label, aria-disabled, aria-expanded, aria-haspopup, aria-controls

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support; components are tabbable and keyboard accessible; some reported issues with Calendar and TabMenu

screen-reader-tested.comment: Components tested with screen readers; explicit mention of screen reader compatibility in docs

focus-management.comment: Focus trapping in overlays like Dialog and Popover; some reported issues with focus guards in Dialog

accessibility-rating.comment: Good accessibility with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, ARIA patterns, keyboard nav, screen reader testing; some reported issues with Dialog focus guards and Calendar keyboard navigation

bundle-size-full.comment: V4.3.2+ reports significant bundle size increases (1.7MB+ vs 500KB in v4.3.1); recommend checking Bundlephobia for current version; tree-shakeable via individual component imports

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable - import components individually for optimal bundle size; no single 'core' bundle size available

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports on-demand imports with auto-imports; each component can be imported individually

zero-runtime.comment: Components require runtime JavaScript; not a zero-runtime solution

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be loaded on demand; VirtualScroller supports lazy data loading; Tree supports lazy node loading

documentation-quality.comment: Good comprehensive documentation with API reference, code examples, accessibility docs; interactive examples on component pages; some TypeScript documentation gaps noted by community

interactive-docs.comment: Live component playground/sandbox available on documentation site

storybook.comment: No official Storybook; interactive examples integrated directly in docs

figma-kit.comment: PrimeOne Figma UI Kit available (commercial); fully integrated with Theme Designer; Figma to theme code generation

cli-generator.comment: Prime CLI (beta) for starting Nuxt and Vite projects; theme-generator GitHub Action for CI/CD

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 413,154 weekly downloads as of December 2025; classified as 'popular'

active-maintenance.comment: Very active; 218 releases total; latest v4.5.4 on Dec 18, 2025; regular updates

commercial-support.comment: PrimeVue PRO offers term-based commercial support with guaranteed response times, enhancement requests; PrimeTek provides enterprise licensing

style-override.comment: Override via className, CSS variables (--p-*), design tokens, passthrough (pt) property; slots for content customization

compound-components.comment: Pattern used in Accordion (AccordionPanel, AccordionHeader, AccordionContent), Splitter (SplitterPanel), Menu components

render-props.comment: Extensive template slot support for customization; render functions supported

slots.comment: Named slots extensively used throughout; item templates, icon slots, content slots, header/footer slots

unstyled-mode.comment: Full unstyled mode available; components can be used without any default styles for complete design control
